comparisonText: Berlin gets 9 hours 11 minutes more daylight in June than December.

july.label: JULY 1
july.comparisonText: Berlin still gets just over 9 hours more daylight on July 1 than around the winter solstice.

august.label: AUG 1
august.comparisonText: Berlin still gets almost 8 hours more daylight on August 1 than around the winter solstice, but the month loses light quickly.

september.label: SEP 1
september.comparisonText: Berlin still gets about 6 hours more daylight on September 1 than around the winter solstice, but the month loses more than an hour of evening light.
